paper_title: Data Processing and Analysis in Electrophysiology and Microscopy

methods.description: This method involves using containerization to package code and dependencies into virtual environments for reliable execution across different computing environments. It leverages Docker and Kubernetes for big data analysis and is deployed using Nextflow to manage workflows efficiently.

methods.description: A canonical workflow for processing electrophysiology data, which includes detecting neuron action potentials and producing standardized reports. This involves channel scanning, data conversion, and spike sorting.

methods.description: This method uses Redis for real-time data stream coordination and containerized processes for data transformation and visualization, allowing for real-time monitoring and analysis.
